text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something changes for Rice Shower after the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: H-hey! You're Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eep! Y-yes, I am!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Don't be nervous! We just want to say you were
amazing at the Kikuka Sho the other day!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I got goosebumps watching you race
against Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Me too! And she was soooo cool! Her face was so
intense!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yes! Bourbon is super fast... And really cool!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
That's why you can't give up, Rice! We'll be
cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: R-really?! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Big Brother?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-Big Sister?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-it's not like that... They just wanted to talk to
me about Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Everyone in the crowd at the Kikuka Sho was
cheering for her, so—
choice_data_list:
They were also cheering because her rival was
there—you.

They were also cheering because her rival was
there—you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Agh... D-don't flatter me that much...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Agh... D-don't flatter me that much...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...But her rival, huh? Hehehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, we get a glimpse of the other side of
the coin the next day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whisper, whisper...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Stay back!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: It looks like it's getting to her.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it would get to me too.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Just look what happened to Bourbon—she's
always in perfect form, but right after racing with
Rice Shower... Well, you know.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sob... Wh-why... why does this always happen?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Why do I always bring misfortune to the people
around me? Why do I always cause trouble?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Stay back! You'll just get hurt if you come close
to me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...No matter how hard she trained, Bourbon has
never been injured... Until...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's all my fault... It happened because she
became rivals with me...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The first three years of an Umamusume's career
are life-changing… and I've ruined it for her
during the most important time.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...She doesn't have to. After all, I—
choice_data_list: So you haven't asked her about it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wait!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wait!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
choice_data_list: Sorry for showing up all of a sudden.
Sorry for showing up all of a sudden.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is no problem. I have become accustomed to
having visitors wish me well recently.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Now, please state your objective.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... I want to apologize. I'm sorry... I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's... my fault that you got hurt! I've ruined this
important time for you!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pardon me, but...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Why are you apologizing? My data indicates you
have nothing to do with the cause of my injury.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-but... you'd never been injured until you
became my rival!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Your reasoning is insufficient. My probability of
injury has remained consistent. Conclusion—your
theory is virtually groundless.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If you insist that you possess the ability to
summon misfortune, then I shall test the
hypothesis using myself as subject.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...You want to test it on yourself?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Correct. I have acknowledged you as my rival.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I sensed your potential for growth at the Kikuka
Sho. I have counted on it.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I predicted that if you were to become my rival, I
would also grow even stronger.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I also predicted the possibility of a so-called
miracle—that you and I might one day run the
ultimate race.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If my poor luck has anything to do with you, Rice,
then surely that race will never occur.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Will you bring me misfortune? Or will you perform
a miracle with me?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That's...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower is unable to answer, Bourbon's words
shaking her to her very core.
